hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Jasmin Villa in Cochin offers recently renovated homestay accommodations with private bathrooms, air-conditioning, and garden views. Each room includes a balcony or patio, work desk, and free toiletries.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests enjoy a garden, terrace, and free WiFi. Additional amenities include a shared kitchen, minimarket, and outdoor seating area. The property provides a 24-hour front desk, daily housekeeping, and room service.
Delicious Breakfast: A variety of breakfast options are available, including continental, vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free. Breakfast is highly praised by guests for its quality and diversity.
Prime Location: Located 42 km from Cochin International Airport, the homestay is near attractions such as Kochi Biennale (1.

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Govindamangalam Homestay in Cochin offers family rooms with private bathrooms, air-conditioning, and free WiFi. Each room includes a work desk, wardrobe, and tiled floors.
Outdoor Spaces: Guests can relax in the garden or on the terrace, enjoying garden views and an outdoor seating area. The property features a balcony and inner courtyard views.
Amenities and Services: The homestay provides free on-site private parking, a shared kitchen, and daily housekeeping. Additional services include a tour desk, bike hire, and free WiFi throughout the property.
Prime Location: Located less than 1 km from Mattancherry Palace and a 12-minute walk to Paradesi Synagogue, the homestay is 41 km from Cochin International Airport.

hotels.name: Old Harbour Hotel
hotels.description_fr:
SituГѓВ© ГѓВ  Fort Cochin, l'Old Harbour Hotel occupe une maison de caractГѓВЁre portugaise rГѓВ©novГѓВ©e, bГѓВўtie il y a 300 ans. Il possГѓВЁde un restaurant, une piscine extГѓВ©rieure et connexion Wi-Fi gratuite dans ses parties communes.

Toutes les chambres sont climatisГѓВ©es et comprennent un minibar, un coin salon, une bouilloire ГѓВ©lectrique ainsi qu'une salle de bains privative pourvue d'une douche, d'articles de toilette gratuits et de chaussons.

L'ГѓВ©tablissement dispose d'une rГѓВ©ception ouverte 24h/24, d'un jardin, d'une terrasse, d'une bagagerie, d'un bureau d'excursions et d'un parking gratuit.

L'ГѓВ©glise Vasco de Gama et la gare routiГѓВЁre de Fort Cochin sont toutes deux accessibles ГѓВ  100 mГѓВЁtres.
hotels.description_en:
Old Harbour Hotel is a 300 year old Portuguese restored mansion located in Fort Kochi, Cochin. Free WiFi access is available in the public areas of the property. The hotel offers an outdoor swimming pool and a restaurant.

Each room here will provide you with air conditioning, a minibar and a seating area. There is also an electric kettle. Featuring a shower, private bathroom also comes with free toiletries and slippers.

At Old Harbour Hotel you will find a 24-hour front desk, a garden and a terrace. Other facilities offered at the property include tour desk and luggage storage. The property offers free parking.

The hotel is 50 metres from the Chinese Fishing Net, 100 metres from the Vasco Da Gama Church and 2 km from the Dutch Palace and the Jewish Synagogue.
hotels.description_es:
El Old Harbour Hotel ocupa una mansiГѓВіn portuguesa restaurada de 300 aГѓВ±os de antigГѓВјedad situada en Fort Kochi, en Cochin. Hay conexiГѓВіn WiFi gratuita en las zonas comunes. El hotel cuenta con una piscina al aire libre y un restaurante.

El Old Harbour Hotel cuenta con recepciГѓВіn 24 horas, jardГѓВ­n y terraza. TambiГѓВ©n cuenta con mostrador de informaciГѓВіn turГѓВ­stica y consigna de equipaje. Hay aparcamiento gratuito.

El hotel estГѓВЎ a 50 metros de la red de pesca china, a 100 metros de la iglesia de Vasco Da Gama y a 2 km del palacio holandГѓВ©s y la sinagoga judГѓВ­a. La estaciГѓВіn de autobuses de Fort Cochin queda a 100 metros.
hotels.description_pt:
O Old Harbour Hotel ГѓВ© uma mansГѓВЈo portuguesa restaurada com 300 anos de idade localizada em Fort Kochi, Cochin. O acesso Wi-Fi gratuito estГѓВЎ disponГѓВ­vel nas ГѓВЎreas pГѓВєblicas da propriedade. O hotel dispГѓВµe de uma piscina exterior e de um restaurante.

hotels.description_it:
L'Old Harbour Hotel occupa un palazzo portoghese restaurato risalente a 300 anni fa e situato a Fort Kochi, a Cochin. Le aree comuni della struttura sono coperte dalla connessione Wi-Fi gratuita. L'hotel offre una piscina all'aperto e un ristorante.

Tutte le camere sono dotate di aria condizionata, minibar, area salotto. A vostra disposizione anche un bollitore elettrico. Il bagno privato ГѓВЁ completo di doccia, set di cortesia e pantofole.

Presso l'Old Harbour Hotel troverete una reception aperta 24 ore su 24, un giardino e una terrazza. A vostra disposizione anche un banco escursioni e un deposito bagagli. Il parcheggio ГѓВЁ gratuito.

L'hotel dista 50 m dalla rete di pesca cinese, 100 m dalla Chiesa Vasco Da Gama e 2 km dal Palazzo Olandese e dalla Sinagoga Ebraica.
